info.title: IPFS Uploader
info.description: Command line tool that helps upload files to an IPFS node.

options.name: --server_url
options.description: The URL to the server running IPFS.

options.name: --port
options.description: The port of the IPFS node's API server.  Remember when setting up a node, this port should NEVER be exposed to the internet. [default: 5001]

options.name: --timeout_multiplier
options.description: How much to multiple the timeout by, in case of a slow connection.  The default timeout is calculated by the file size uploaded using a 100Mbps connection. A value of 0 means infinite timeout (not recommended). [default: 1]

options.name: --output_xml_file
options.description: Where to output an file that contains the created hashes in XML format

options.name: --file
options.description: The file to upload to IPFS.  Globs are allowed.  Directories are not.

options.name: --print_license
options.description: Prints this program's license to stdout, and exits.  This takes priority over all other print options. [default: False]

options.name: --print_readme
options.description: Prints the readme file to stdout, and exits. This takes priority over the --print_credits option. [default: False]

options.name: --print_credits
options.description: Prints the third-party licenses to stdout, and exits. [default: False]
